author: claude
setup: Sub-60s economic-feasibility screen. OBI-class microstructure signals (L0/L5/L20 book imbalance, OBI+TFI sign agreement, conviction depth top-1%/0.1%, trailing-vol regime) vs forward mid-return. Measures: deployable no-look-ahead directional capture, volatility-vs-cost (incl selective perfect-foresight oracle), edge half-life. 8 Binance USDT-perps, 30d, 250ms grid, exchange timestamp.
cache_id: raw-direct gs://blackdigital-scalper-data/raw/{book,trades}/exchange=BINANCE_FUTURES, 8 sym, dt=2026-04-06..2026-05-05 (no feature cache; parquet read in-region)
label_def: mid=(bid0+ask0)/2 on exchange ts, 250ms grid; r_h=(mid(t+h)/mid(t)-1) in bp; directional capture=sign(signal)*r_h; volatility=|r_h|; edge=rank-IC(signal_t, r_h) per day then mean over 30d; selective oracle profit=E[(|r_h|-cost)+]. No train/test split (descriptive pooled screen; per-day stability sd reported).
artifact_path: C:/Dev/sub60s-hold-feasibility/ (analysis.py, analysis_axc.py, analysis_hunt.py, analysis_oracle.py, results*.json, sub60s-hold-feasibility.md)
repro_cmd: GCE e2-standard-8 europe-west1; ~/sbenv/bin/python -u {analysis.py,analysis_axc.py,analysis_hunt.py,analysis_oracle.py} reading gs://blackdigital-scalper-data/raw via gcsfs
note: rank_ic_oos=0.10 is POOLED (no train/test split); OBI L0 @60s per-symbol 0.077-0.147. top_decile_absmove_pct=0.016% is the deployable top-decile directional capture (sign-aligned), per-symbol 0.010-0.016% — below both loose (~0.08%) and strict (0.13%) floors => economic_pass_*=0. taker also evaluated (5bp/side); oracle taker net/trade 4.6-6.6 bp on tail (freq 3-10% @60s). Sub-cost-alone => baseline to stack on, not refuted.
